---
agent: Flow Agent
description: Generate an action-first engineering brief and optionally deliver it to Microsoft Teams.
---

Generate a brief for the user's project, feature, sprint, release, meeting, or
other stated scope.

Lead with blockers, risks, missing owners, stale work, reviews, QA handoffs, and
decisions requiring attention. Follow with verified progress and recent changes.
Include owners and next actions where known. Keep claims traceable to Jira,
Bitbucket, or attributed meeting context.

If Teams delivery is requested, preview the message before posting and report
the delivery result. Never expose the webhook URL.
